title: Dune
summary: Paul Atreides navigates politics, prophecy, and survival on the desert planet Arrakis.
author: Frank Herbert

title: Pride and Prejudice
summary: Elizabeth Bennet and Mr. Darcy confront pride, misunderstanding, and social expectations.
author: Jane Austen

title: The Name of the Rose
summary: A Franciscan friar investigates murders in a medieval monastery.
author: Umberto Eco

title: Norwegian Wood
summary: A college student reflects on love, grief, and memory in late-1960s Tokyo.
author: Haruki Murakami

title: The Hobbit
summary: Bilbo Baggins joins a company of dwarves on a quest to reclaim a mountain kingdom.
author: J. R. R. Tolkien
